creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text:
After upgrading to version 7.1.0.3, Impress experienced problems with displaying fonts. Button icons also sometimes disappear, the entire interface turns gray (observed in all LibreOffice applications). In addition, fonts are not displayed as before.

I think this is the same error as https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=247428. And I think this problem has the same solution.
